novel_features.name: Actual spend summary
novel_features.description: Queries Azure Cost Management for actual billed spend over a selected timeframe.

novel_features.name: Spend ownership breakdowns
novel_features.description: Groups actual Azure spend by service, with sibling commands for resource groups and tag keys.

novel_features.name: Tag hygiene check
novel_features.description: Uses Azure Resource Graph to find resources missing a requested owner, environment, or cost-center tag.

novel_features.name: Explainable cost anomaly scan
novel_features.description: Compares recent service spend against a prior window and reports large changes without modifying Azure.

novel_features.name: Retail price estimate helper
novel_features.description: Searches public Azure Retail Prices separately from actual billed spend so estimates do not get confused with invoice data.
